name: Error Buzz
description: a short harsh buzz signalling an invalid or blocked action
usage: Invalid action, not enough money, blocked placement.

ai.prompt: An invalid-action cue: a soft, muted low double-thud denial, tasteful and non-harsh, not a harsh electronic buzz. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
